form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At very long odds at debut, 5th of 9 at this track on January 30 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Daffodil Delight carrying 60kg at $101. Second-up 8th of 11 at this track on March 6 over 1200m, slow going 13 len behind Fateful Love carrying 60kg at $13.50. Others going much better heading into this one.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 2nd in a small field at this track on March 20 over 1200m, slow going 0.5 len behind Obsidian Star with 60kg at $1.80. Started favourite and went close. Shows ability and can go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Was well-supported at debut, 2nd in a small field at this track on March 20 over 1200m, slow going 0.5 len behind Obsidian Star with 60kg at $1.80. Started favourite and went close. Shows ability and can go one better.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 11 at this track on March 6 over 1200m, on a slow track; 15 len behind Fateful Love carrying 60kg at $41. Before that 4th in a small field at this track on February 6 over 1000m, 8 len behind Casperita with 60kg at $13.50. Fully tested on her recent run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped awkwardly, stumbled and dislodged App B Soodoo shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At big odds at debut, second last in a small field at this track on February 6 over 1000m, 10 len behind Casperita with 60kg at $41. Last start second last of 8 at this track in LR on March 13 over 1200m, 10 len behind Marchland with 60kg at $101. Not keen on her chances.
